Description

(+ UST)【UTAUカバー】Lag Train ラグトレイン - Utane Uta/Defoko うたねうた/ 唄音ウタ (Animation)
4.6KLikes
62,543Views
2025Mar 30
"It seems the train to the city of faraway farewell has finally departed." I finally finished this ;w; idk why but I just felt that Defoko's voice is perfect for Lag Train so I used her original bank for this cover! Please excuse the slowness of this project's completion. I'm just about to graduate my last year of college and got caught up in academic requirements TT It was a bit hard on me and I got really burnt out but I managed to pick myself back up!! This completed animation project is proof of that ^^ So once again, I would like to thank you for sticking around. Everyone's support means so much, and I can never say it enough! I hope you enjoy the video!! ~~~~~~~~ CREDITS ~~~~~~~~~~~ Song: ラグトレイン (Lag Train) - Inabakumori Music/Lyrics/Arrangement: Inabakumori Instrumental: Inabakumori (   • 稲葉曇『ラグトレイン』Vo. 歌愛ユキ  ) Video: magi_502 Voicebank: Utane Uta/Defoko (https://utau.fandom.com/wiki/Uta_Utane) Software: UTAU VOICEBANK/UST DOWNLOAD: https://ko-fi.com/magi_502/shop Lyrics and English Translation: Vocaloid Wiki (https://vocaloidlyrics.fandom.com/wik...) ~~~~~~~~~ MY SOCIALS ~~~~~~~~~~~ https://magi502-intro.carrd.co …...more
